'''âsh-ng-k-sh''' ('''kashangkeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charleston|charleston]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charleston|charleston]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-ng-k-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kashangkeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishangkeshoko|thishangkeshoko]] || [[word:jishangkeshoko|jishangkeshoko]] || [[word:shishangkeshoko|shishangkeshoko]] || [[word:kishangkeshoko|kishangkeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushangkeshoko|thuthushangkeshoko]] || [[word:jujushangkeshoko|jujushangkeshoko]] || [[word:shushushangkeshoko|shushushangkeshoko]] || [[word:kukushangkeshoko|kukushangkeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushangkeshoko|thushangkeshoko]] || [[word:jushangkeshoko|jushangkeshoko]] || [[word:shushangkeshoko|shushangkeshoko]] || [[word:kushangkeshoko|kushangkeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshangkeshoko|thoshangkeshoko]] || [[word:joshangkeshoko|joshangkeshoko]] || [[word:shoshangkeshoko|shoshangkeshoko]] || [[word:koshangkeshoko|koshangkeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshangkeshoko|thoshangkeshoko]] || [[word:joshangkeshoko|joshangkeshoko]] || [[word:shoshangkeshoko|shoshangkeshoko]] || [[word:koshangkeshoko|koshangkeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshangkeshoko|thĂŠshangkeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshangkeshoko|jĂŠshangkeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshangkeshoko|shĂŠshangkeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshangkeshoko|kĂŠshangkeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashangkeshoko|thashangkeshoko]] || [[word:jashangkeshoko|jashangkeshoko]] || [[word:shashangkeshoko|shashangkeshoko]] || [[word:kashangkeshoko|kashangkeshoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shashangkeshithi|shashangkeshithi]] || [[word:shashangkeshiji|shashangkeshiji]] || [[word:shashangkeshishi|shashangkeshishi]] || [[word:shashangkeshiki|shashangkeshiki]]
